abilities.name: Close-Quarters Gunfighter
abilities.rule: When you are Engaged in melee range with an enemy, firing a Pistol does not create an Opening. You never provoke reactionary Triggers from adversaries just for using your sidearm in close quarters.

abilities.name: Fan the Hammer
abilities.rule: Reduce Effect by 1 Tier against all targets and your weapon is instantly emptied — requires a Maneuver to Reload. Target up to 3 enemies in the same zone. Make a single Ranged Control roll applying the Step-Down penalty of the target with the highest Presence. On success, roll your Power die once, then subtract each individual target's Resistance to determine their specific Effect Tier. Ranged is your Aligned Discipline — spend 1 Edge via Tier Boost to offset the -1 Tier drop for all targets.

abilities.name: The Hustler's Stamina
abilities.rule: At the end of any Scene in which you spent at least 1 Edge, you automatically regain 1 Edge.

abilities.name: The Hair-Trigger
abilities.rule: Your maximum Triggers per round is permanently increased by 1. This extra Trigger can only be used to perform Ranged (Pistol) actions to exploit an Opening.

abilities.name: The Professional's Reserve
abilities.rule: At the end of a scene, if you have exactly 1 Edge remaining in your pool, you regain 1 Edge. This stacks with The Hustler's Stamina.

abilities.name: The Sixth Sense
abilities.rule: Spend a Trigger when an enemy declares an attack against you to instinctively react. You instantly gain [Guarded 1] (if targeted by a melee attack) or [Cover 1] (if targeted by a ranged attack) for that single interaction, even if you are standing in open ground.

abilities.name: Sight Beyond Sight
abilities.rule: You perceive the world as a tapestry of living energy. You permanently ignore all Step Down penalties associated with darkness, heavy smoke, or the [Blinded] condition when defending against or interacting with living targets. You do not need physical sight to know exactly where they are.

abilities.name: The Precognitive Lure
abilities.rule: Reduce your Dodge result by -1 Effect Tier (if this pushes your success to a negative number, you suffer a Fleeting hit from the enemy). On any result, gain the [Optimized] condition on your next Action against that specific attacker.

abilities.name: The Moving Meditation
abilities.rule: If you spent at least 1 Edge during a scene and successfully used a Discipline (Sense) maneuver to read a target, OR successfully used The Sixth Sense to anticipate an attack, you regain 1 Edge at the scene's end.

abilities.name: Shatterpoint
abilities.rule: You are no longer bound by the limit of one Trigger per round. When an enemy or ally creates an [Opening], you may spend 1 Edge to pay the cost of a Trigger to exploit it using any Force Trigger (including The Sixth Sense).

abilities.name: Inner Calm
abilities.rule: You are never truly caught off guard. Your connection to the Force maintains a constant perimeter of awareness. When rolling for Initiative (Join Battle), you may use Discipline (Sense) instead of Discipline (Tactics).

abilities.name: Iron Grip
abilities.rule: When an enemy [Pinned] by your Clinch spends their Maneuver to break free, the [Pinned] condition converts to [Restrained] rather than clearing entirely. They return to standing, but your hold does not release. Fully breaking free now requires spending their Action instead. The Clinch extends — the only way out is to fully commit to it.

abilities.name: The Drag
abilities.rule: While you have an enemy [Pinned] or [Restrained], your Zone movement does not require releasing the hold. The target moves with you — you control the ground they occupy. This repositioning does not constitute voluntary movement on their part and does not present an Opening from the grappled target. Openings from other enemies in Zones you pass through still apply to you normally.

abilities.name: Smash
abilities.rule: Can only be declared while you have an enemy [Pinned]. Reduce Effect by 1 Tier. Step Up your Power Die once — the ground eliminates their ability to absorb or redirect the blow. If the net result after the tier reduction resolves at Solid or higher, the target gains [Weakened (Physique)] for as long as the hold is maintained.

abilities.name: Wear Them Down
abilities.rule: At the end of any scene in which you maintained a Clinch hold ([Pinned] or [Restrained]) on the same target for 2 or more consecutive rounds, you regain 1 Edge. Patience is a form of violence.

abilities.name: The Warden's Justice
abilities.rule: While you have an enemy [Pinned], every Brawl attack you make against them creates an Opening — regardless of the roll result — that one ally in your Zone may immediately spend their Trigger on to make a Brawl or Melee attack against that same target. You control the hold. The room delivers the verdict.

abilities.name: Iron Chin
abilities.rule: The first time each scene you would be Incapacitated, you may spend 2 Edge. If you do, you remain at 1 Vitality and do not become Incapacitated. On your very next turn, your Clinch Maneuver automatically resolves at the Dominate tier — [Pinned] + [Exposed to Melee Attacks] + your Brawl attacks Step Up the Power Die — without requiring a roll. Survival instinct converts directly into total control.

abilities.name: Hardened
abilities.rule: Conditions applied to you as a secondary effect of a Fleeting-tier attack do not take effect. Fleeting hits still deal their normal Vitality damage — you simply refuse to let minor impacts compromise your combat effectiveness. Conditions generated by your own failed defensive rolls still apply normally; this only negates secondary conditions imposed by an attacker's Fleeting result.

abilities.name: Resolve Under Fire
abilities.rule: When you are the target of 2 or more attacks in a single round, regardless of their outcomes, you do not generate Openings from defensive rolls made after the first attack this round. You are still hit; you simply stop gifting the room a target when everyone is already shooting at you.

abilities.name: Dig Deep
abilities.rule: Can only be declared when you are currently suffering at least one active condition. Reduce Effect by 1 Tier on a Resolve check. Remove one active condition currently affecting you, regardless of its source. If the removed condition was originally applied by an enemy Gambit, that enemy immediately generates an Opening — they overplayed their hand.

abilities.name: Suffer and Endure
abilities.rule: At the end of any scene in which you were struck by 3 or more successful hits without being Incapacitated, you regain 1 Edge. The one who eats the most punishment and keeps standing walks out changed.

abilities.name: Immovable Object
abilities.rule: Any effect that would physically reposition you — knockback, Push Gambits, forced Zone-shift — of Basic tier or lower automatically fails. Effects of Solid tier or higher may still move you, but when they do, they generate an Opening that any ally within line of sight may exploit as a free Trigger.

abilities.name: Pain Is Data
abilities.rule: The first time each round you suffer a hit of Solid tier or higher, your very next offensive or Resolve action this round has its Effect result stepped up by 1 Tier. Getting hurt does not slow you down — it clarifies your targets. This bonus resets at the start of each new round and cannot stack.

abilities.name: Read the Field
abilities.rule: Once per round, as a free Trigger, designate one visible enemy. The next ally (not you) who attacks that enemy this round treats them as [Exposed] for that single attack. The designation expires at the end of the round whether used or not. You see the gap — you just need someone willing to step through it.

abilities.name: Tactical Positioning
abilities.rule: Whenever you succeed on a Tactics check — to read a situation, coordinate allies, or assess an enemy — you may immediately move 1 Zone as a free Maneuver. This movement does not count against your action economy for the round. Good information earns good ground.

abilities.name: Coordinated Strike
abilities.rule: Reduce Effect by 1 Tier on a Tactics check. One ally within line of sight who has already spent their Trigger this round may make one additional attack using their Control Die only. This attack cannot trigger Gambits but can generate an Opening. You spend your own result to give an exhausted teammate one more chance.

abilities.name: Strategic Reserve
abilities.rule: At the end of any scene in which at least 2 Openings created by your abilities — Read the Field or Coordinated Strike — were exploited by allies (not you), you regain 1 Edge. Your economy depends entirely on your team executing. That is by design.

abilities.name: Unflinching Assessment
abilities.rule: You are immune to the [Shaken] condition. When any source would apply [Shaken] to you, reduce the triggering effect's final Effect Tier by 1 retroactively — the impact lands, but your mental clarity means it matters less than the attacker intended. Trying to suppress the Tactician's mind is a tactical mistake.

abilities.name: The Whole Board
abilities.rule: You may maintain two Read the Field designations simultaneously instead of one. Additionally, when both of your designated targets generate an Opening in the same round, you gain 1 Edge immediately — not at scene's end. Seeing everything at once is the Tactician's only real weapon.

abilities.name: Still as Death
abilities.rule: While [Hidden], enemies who enter your Zone do not automatically detect you. Detection requires a deliberate Search action — a Wits/Investigation check opposed by your original Stealth result — or you performing any observable action (attack, loud maneuver, Edge-costing ability). Passive movement through your Zone is not sufficient to reveal your position.

abilities.name: Dead Air
abilities.rule: If you hold your action for an entire round — making no attack and spending no Edge — you automatically reenter [Hidden] at the start of your next turn regardless of whether it was broken. No roll required. You were simply never there. The cost is your entire round. The reward is the reset.

abilities.name: Ambush Strike
abilities.rule: Can only be declared while [Hidden]. Reduce Effect by 1 Tier. Step Up your Power Die once for this attack and apply [Exposed] to the target regardless of the Effect Tier result. You immediately lose [Hidden] after the attack resolves — whether the Gambit succeeds or fails. You spend your position for a wound and a window for your allies.

abilities.name: Fade
abilities.rule: At the end of any round in which you made no attack and spent no Edge, you may attempt to reenter [Hidden] as a free Trigger — an opposed Stealth check against the highest Investigation die in the zone. On success, you gain [Hidden]. On failure, you cannot attempt Fade again until you move to a new Zone. Patience is a discipline.

abilities.name: Leave No Trace
abilities.rule: When you successfully reenter [Hidden] through Fade, you regain 1 Edge. The act of becoming invisible is its own reward. This does not trigger from Dead Air or any other source of [Hidden] reentry — only from a successful Fade check.

abilities.name: Phantom Strike
abilities.rule: Attacks made while [Hidden] treat the Control Die result as a minimum of Basic tier (4–7) before the Power Die is applied, regardless of the actual roll. You never waste a shot from the shadows. This floor applies only to the attack that breaks [Hidden] — follow-up actions after your position is revealed resolve normally.
